content:
Building transportation facility design software: digitalization planning of transportation hubs

Transportation facilities are an important professional field of architectural design. From transportation space design to passenger flow, from hub planning to facility configuration, transportation facility design software helps designers scientifically design transportation buildings. This article will comprehensively evaluate mainstream construction transportation facility design software to help transportation architects master the digitalization planning tools of transportation hubs.

Transportation facility design Corevalue of the software

Transportation facility design software assumes key functions in architectural design:

  • Transportation space: transportation building space design
  • Passenger flow: passenger flow planning
  • Hub planning: transportation hub overall planning
  • Facility configuration: transportation facility equipment configuration
  • Passenger flow analysis: passenger flow simulation analysis

In-depth Review: Mainstream transportation facility design software

Revit Transportation: BIM transportation design tool

Revit Transportation is a transportation facility design work method on the Revit platform.

Core Features:

  • BIM transportation building modeling
  • Transportation space library
  • Passenger passage design
  • Transportation facility library
  • Automatic generation of construction drawings

BIMadvantages:

Revit Transportation's Corevantages are BIMintegration. Transportation facility design is integrated into BIM models, and design and construction are seamlessly connected.

Channel design:

RevitSupported parametric design of passenger passages, efficient traffic space design.

Transport Facility Designer: Transportation facility design tool

Transport Facility Designer is a professional software for transportation facility design.

Core Features:

  • Transportation building space design
  • Passenger flow planning
  • Passenger flow analysis function
  • Transportation facility configuration
  • Hub planning tool

Transportation professional:

Transport Facility Designer's Coreadvantages is a transportation major. The software is specifically oriented to transportation facility design needs, and its function fits the transportation design process.

Process planning:

The software supports passenger flow planning and optimizes transportation space.

Terminal Designer: a professional tool for terminal design

Terminal Designer is a professional software for terminal design.

Core Features:

  • Terminal space modeling
  • Passenger process module
  • Check-in and waiting design
  • Transportation facility configuration
  • Program visualization

Terminal professional:

Terminal Designer's Coreadvantages is specialized in terminal buildings. The software can accurately design each functional space in the terminal.

Check-in design:

The software supports special designs such as check-in and waiting to meet the needs of passenger processes.

Transportation facility design software Comparison Table

Software nameTransportation spacePassenger processPeople flow analysisBIM integrationPrice range
Revit TransportationExcellentGoodGoodCompleteintegration
Transport Facility DesignerExcellentExcellentExcellentGoodSubscription-based
Terminal DesignerExcellentExcellentGoodGoodSubscription-only
Rail Station ToolGoodGoodGoodGoodSubscription system
Bus Terminal ToolGoodGoodGoodGoodSubscription-based
Port Facility ToolGoodGoodGoodGoodSubscription system

Traffic facility design software development trend forecast

AI traffic planning

A I will assist in the design of transportation facilities. AI can automatically generate space plans and optimize process layouts based on passenger flow.

BIM transportation deepening

Transportation facility design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. Transportation building models will be integrated into architectural BIM projects, and design and construction will be seamlessly connected.

Process simulation deepening

Passenger process simulation will be more accurate. Designers can simulate passenger traffic and optimize traffic space and process design.

Intelligent transportation design

Intelligent transportation design function will be more improved. Designers can integrate intelligent transportation systems and realize intelligent transportation facilities ce.

Purchasing suggestions

When choosing transportation facility design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Facility type: airports, stations, and ports have different needs
  • Process requirements: Passenger process design requires process planning tools
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects are suitable for Revit Transportation
  • People flow needs: People flow analysis requires people flow simulation function
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software costs and training investment

Transportation facility design software is a digitalization planning tool for transportation hubs. Choose appropriate transportation facility design software to scientifically design transportation buildings.

step.text: Evaluate each shortlisted Best Agricultural Rental Facility Design Review Software solution against your requirements. Test key features through demos or trials. Assess ease of use, integration capabilities, and support quality.

step.name: Make Your Selection
step.text: Select the Best Agricultural Rental Facility Design Review Software solution that best fits your needs. Consider total cost, implementation timeline, training requirements, and long-term scalability. Negotiate terms and finalize the contract.
